main_retry_audit.retry_policy: provider/transport exceptions used up to three project-level adapter attempts per batch; retry_count summarizes those adapter attempts, while OpenAI-compatible SDK internal retries and their outbound HTTP attempts were not observed; tasks with a terminal technical-error checkpoint remained pending and were retried by later checkpoint-resume invocations; completed malformed or empty model outputs were not retried
